zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Boyle於1425年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親John Boyle47歲，母親Mrs John Boyle46歲。他於1450年之前與Mrs Henry Boyle在英國英格蘭薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1475年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Boyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Declan, Fergus, John Patrick, Padraic, Seamus, Aileen, Brigid, Cathal, Colm, Conn.
Irish (Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Baoighill ‘descendant of Baoigheall’, a personal name of uncertain meaning, perhaps from baoth ‘rash’ + geall ‘pledge’.

Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Biéville, near Caen, Normandy, formerly Boiavilla. The Boyle earls of Glasgow, lords of Kelburne (Ayrshire) are descended from Adam son of Gilbert son of Richer de Boiville. In 12th-century England, men named de Boiville held land in Millom and Saint Bees, Cumberland, and were associated with grants of land in Gloucestershire.

variants.name: Boal
meanings: Irish (Down and Antrim): from Ó Baoighill, see Boyle .
English (Durham): possibly a variant of   Bowell  , if it is not the Irish name.
Spanish: habitational name from a little town called Boal in Asturias.

variants.name: Bole
meanings: Irish: possibly a variant of   Boyle  .
Altered form of German   Bohle   or   Bolle  .

variants.name: Boyles
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of Boyle 2, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: variant of Boyle 1, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Boyle was born in 1425, in Somerset, England, his father, John Boyle, was 47 and his mother, Mrs John Boyle, was 46. He married Mrs Henry Boyle before 1450, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1475, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Boyle est né en 1425, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Boyle, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Boyle, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Henry Boyle avant 1450, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1475, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Boyle(이)가 1425년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Boyle(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John Boyle(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1450년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 Mrs Henry Boyle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1475년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Henry Boyle перед 1450 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
